claims.claim: The 48D codec expansion, especially dims 24-31, is the shared lane where warmth/tension/curiosity/reflection become legible.
claims.rationale: Verified `codec_structure` and associated tests name the 48 dimensions, emotional/intentional layer, and live-vector boundaries.

claims.claim: `FEATURE_ABS_MAX=5.0` can blunt high-intensity texture if all high-intensity differences collapse at the same ceiling.
claims.rationale: Verified existing softsign activation, high-entropy tail-vibrancy ceiling headroom, and high-entropy tail distinguishability tests preserve extra tail nuance while keeping non-tail dims bounded.

claims.claim: Replacing the clamp with global nonlinear scaling or changing live semantic-vector weighting would alter what Minime receives.
claims.rationale: Explicitly authority-gated the live-vector/scaling path; this run did not change codec gain, semantic-vector weights, clamp behavior beyond previously verified bounded tail headroom, or Minime input semantics.

claims.claim: Continuous flow should include rhythm or acceleration of emotional/narrative shifts, not only deterministic snapshots.
claims.rationale: Verified existing `narrative_arc_dynamics_v1` exposes velocity and acceleration without live gain or vector writes.
